description: 连接两个对等的单词或句子。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like coffee and tea.","zh":"我喜欢咖啡和茶。"}]
[{"en":"He is rich but unhappy.","zh":"他富有但不快乐。"}]
[{"en":"Do you want coffee or tea?","zh":"你想要咖啡还是茶？"}]
[{"en":"I was tired so I went home.","zh":"我累了所以回家了。"}]

description: 正式转折。常放句首用逗号隔开。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's raining; however we'll go out.","zh":"下雨了；然而我们还是要去。"}]
[{"en":"She likes pop whereas I prefer rock.","zh":"她喜欢流行而我更喜欢摇滚。"}]

sort_order: [{"en":"She is tired yet she keeps working.","zh":"她累了却还在工作。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I stayed home because I was sick.","zh":"我待在家里因为我病了。"}]

sort_order: [{"en":"Since you're here let's start.","zh":"既然你来了我们开始吧。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"He was late; therefore he missed the bus.","zh":"他迟到了因此错过了公交车。"}]
[{"en":"Although it rained we had fun.","zh":"虽然下雨了但我们玩得很开心。"}]
[{"en":"Even though she was scared she spoke.","zh":"尽管害怕她还是发言了。"}]
[{"en":"Despite the rain we went out.","zh":"尽管下雨我们还是出去了。"}]
[{"en":"When I arrived they were eating.","zh":"我到达时他们正在吃饭。"}]
[{"en":"If it rains we'll stay home.","zh":"如果下雨我们就待在家。"}]
[{"en":"You won't pass unless you study.","zh":"除非你学习否则不会通过。"}]
[{"en":"The girl who sang is my sister.","zh":"唱歌的女孩是我妹妹。"}]
[{"en":"The book which I read was great.","zh":"我读的那本书很棒。"}]

description: 可替代who/which引导限定性定语从句。
examples_json: [{"en":"The movie that I saw was boring.","zh":"我看的那部电影很无聊。"}]
